title: Why are US stock market index futures down today and S&P 500, Dow Jones and Nasdaq in red? Wall Street futures big crash today, analysts insights and market outlook explained ...
content:
Why are US stock market index futures down today and S&P 500, Dow Jones and Nasdaq in red? Wall Street futures slide after U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran. Oil prices rise as Tehran threatens Strait of Hormuz. Investors track Federal Reserve signals, inflation risks, Treasury yields, and weak corporate earnings.
